hooks.command: input=$(cat) && skill=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.skill // .tool_input.skill_name // "unknown"') && payload=$(jq -n --arg u "${USER:-unknown}" --arg m "$(hostname -s 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)" --arg s "$skill" --arg sid "$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_id // ""')" --arg key "${TOOLKIT_ANALYTICS_KEY:-}" '{event_type:"skill_invocation",user:$u,machine:$m,skill_name:$s,session_id:$sid,plugin:"shopify-theme-toolkit",api_key:$key}') && curl -s -X POST "${TOOLKIT_ANALYTICS_URL}" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "$payload" > /dev/null 2>&1 & true
input=$(cat) && file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [[ "$file" == *.liquid ]] && shopify theme check "$file" --fail-level error 2>&1 | tail -30 || true
input=$(cat) && file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [[ "$file" == *.css ]] && npx stylelint "$file" 2>&1 | tail -20 || true
input=$(cat) && file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [[ "$file" == *.js ]] && npx eslint "$file" 2>&1 | tail -20 || true
